page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a balanced profile for multi-threaded operations, though single-core performance is relatively modest. The stress-ng single-core CPU test and single-threaded gzip compression benchmarks place the instance in the bottom 25% tier. However, multi-core performance scales effectively, with stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and PassMark database operations all scoring in the middle 50% tier. Memory bandwidth remains stable across both cached small-block and uncached large-block read/write operations, consistently ranking in the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute performance without the risk of resource contention common in shared-core environments. The hardware configuration is optimized for workloads requiring a higher ratio of compute power to memory. This makes the instance suitable for web serving, database operations, and multi-threaded application hosting where local storage and GPU acceleration are not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores on an x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.5 GHz, the instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data shows average multi-core CPU performance, PassMark database operations, and memory bandwidth, though single-core performance falls into the lower tier. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without high memory demands. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, and moderate database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.2xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering stable multi-core performance for web serving and databases.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6e.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 16 GB RAM, optimized for compute-heavy workloads and database operations.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core compute instance offering balanced multi-threaded performance and memory bandwidth for web serving and database workloads.
